creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Installing or updating either port lang/tcl85 (or x11-toolskits/open-motiv (see PR ports/174795)) with pkgng/portmaster results in the belwo shown error/conflict.

[...]
Installing and cross-linking C API (.3) docs to /usr/local/man/man3/
Installing and cross-linking command (.n) docs to /usr/local/man/mann/
**********
IMPORTANT:
**********
tclConfig.sh in /usr/local/lib/tcl8.5/tclConfig.sh
tcl.h        in /usr/local/include/tcl8.5/tcl.h
tclDecls.h   in /usr/local/include/tcl8.5/tclDecls.h
There are NOT default place, but good place to avoid
conflicting with another version of Tcl/Tks.
===>   Compressing manual pages for tcl-8.5.13
===>   Running ldconfig
/sbin/ldconfig -m /usr/local/lib
===>   Registering installation for tcl-8.5.13
Installing tcl-8.5.13...pkg: tcl-8.5.13 conflicts with open-motif-2.3.4 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/man/man3/Object.3.gz
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 70

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/tcl85.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/tcl85.

===>>> Installation of tcl-8.5.13 (lang/tcl85) failed
===>>> Aborting update

Terminated

===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:
       portmaster <flags> lang/tcl85
